query: prism rainbow color refraction edge fringing photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — prism/rainbow refraction, RGB color separation

response.objective_caption: A large circular structure made of concentric bands of vivid rainbow colors—including red, orange, yellow, green, and blue—occupies the foreground of a sandy beach scene. Behind it, tall evergreen trees rise against a partly cloudy sky, while a yellow and red inflatable slide and several people are visible near a low wall in the mid-ground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large circular structure made of concentric bands of vivid rainbow colors—including red, orange, yellow, green, and blue—is captured with intentional motion blur as it spins, creating sweeping streaks and a dynamic, dreamlike dissolution of its edges. It sits on a sandy beach with tall evergreen trees rising behind it under a partly cloudy sky, while a yellow and red inflatable slide and several people are visible near a low wall in the mid-ground.
